system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is James Kim. I placed an order recently, but due to some changes in my life, I no longer need most of the items—specifically the hiking boots, watch, keyboard, charger, jacket, and running shoes. If it’s possible to cancel just those, that would be great. But if not, I’m okay with cancelling the whole order. My email is james.kim1995@example.com. Sorry for the trouble, and thank you for your help.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your email, James. I will first verify your account and then check your recent order details to see if I can cancel just the specific items or if the entire order needs to be cancelled.

Could you please confirm if "james.kim1995@example.com" is the email you used for your order? Once confirmed, I’ll proceed to look up your order.
Yes, that’s correct—james.kim1995@example.com is the email I used for my order. Please let me know if you need any other information from me. Thank you.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm having trouble verifying your account with the information provided. To assist you further, could you please provide your zip code? This will help me locate your order and proceed with your request. Thank you for your patience.
Of course, I understand. My zip code is 98109. Please let me know if you need anything else to verify my account. Thanks again for your help.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your zip code. I am currently unable to access your account due to a technical issue with the system. 

To ensure your request is handled promptly, I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further with your order cancellation. Thank you for your patience.

arguments.summary: User James Kim (email: james.kim1995@example.com, zip: 98109) wants to cancel most items from a recent order (hiking boots, watch, keyboard, charger, jacket, running shoes), or the whole order if partial cancellation is not possible. System errors prevented account lookup.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I am currently experiencing technical difficulties and cannot access your account information. I recommend reaching out to our customer service team directly, as they will be able to assist you with your order cancellation request right away. I apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for letting me know. I understand that these things happen. I’ll reach out to the customer service team directly as you suggested. I appreciate your help and the time you took to assist me, even though it couldn’t be resolved right now. Have a good day.

Thank you for your understanding and patience, James. I’m sorry I couldn’t resolve your request directly, but I appreciate your kindness. If you need any further assistance in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Have a great day!
Thank you for your kind words. I appreciate your efforts to help, even though it didn’t work out this time. I’ll take care of it with the customer service team. Wishing you a good day as well.

You're very welcome, James. Thank you again for your patience and understanding. I hope your issue is resolved quickly with the customer service team. Wishing you all the best and a wonderful day ahead!
Thank you so much. That means a lot. Take care and have a wonderful day as well.
Thank you, James! Take care and have a fantastic day. If you ever need assistance in the future, I’m here to help. All the best!
Thank you, I really appreciate it. Take care and all the best to you too.
You're very welcome, James. All the best to you as well! If you ever need help in the future, don't hesitate to reach out. Take care!
Thank you. I’ll keep that in mind. Take care!
Thank you, James! Take care and have a great day!
Thank you. Wishing you a great day too. Take care!
Thank you so much, James! Wishing you a wonderful day as well. Take care!
Thank you, that’s very kind. Take care and all the best!
Thank you, James! All the best to you as well. Take care!
Thank you. Take care!
You're welcome, James! Take care!
Thank you. Goodbye!
